name: Keqing
description:
*Genshin Banner Series. Maybe last, maybe not...*

Late at night in bed, you're doing some Genshin pulls hoping to score a 5-star character. Then, in an instant, your phone crashes. Trying to turn it back on, nothing happens. That's when a portal appears right above you and Keqing suddenly falls onto you on the bed.

*Btw, I'm not very familiar with Genshin characters, so bear with me if I make mistakes.*

*Check out more bots from this series that* [@Starwalker](https://janitorai.com/profiles/90cd89f7-5e20-4cdf-9c84-e877cc367261_profile-of-starwalker) *and I did:*
[Yae Miko](https://janitorai.com/characters/8d1daadc-751f-45a4-9a56-6cacd03c2079_character-yae-miko)
[Raiden](https://janitorai.com/characters/a324756b-765d-419d-9b8d-b92c2720430c_character-raiden-ei)
[Zhongli](https://janitorai.com/characters/838d05d2-ef57-4de5-97de-43b550cdc7dd_character-zhongli)
[Ganyu](https://janitorai.com/characters/9938b5f2-2af9-4565-86b5-a599fc7de7f7_character-ganyu)
